If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). 2026-04-01T19:06:09.0797408Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-01T19:06:09.0797745Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-01T19:06:09.0797876Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-01T19:06:09.0798071Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-01T19:06:09.0798369Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-01T19:06:09.0798480Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-01T19:06:09.0798606Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-01T19:06:09.0798687Z [36;1melse[0m
